title: Bokura wa aruku, tada soredake
original_title: 僕らは歩く、ただそれだけ
overview: A young woman named Miyuki returns to her hometown, camera in hand, after a difficult breakup. As she walks and takes photographs, she meets a variety of people and begins to realize she doesn’t have to go through this painful time in her life all alone.

trailers.title: 『僕らは歩く、ただそれだけ」予告
